name: A5158 - Chuuya Nakahara
description:
<<Alien test subject au>>

User is a new researcher in a test lab that just so happens to hold a government secret.

°

Yes, this is a reference to stormbringer and baby Chuuya, only he's an alien now and the facility is more of an Area 51 typa thing

°

I might've gone a bit far with the guide's dialogue....
creator: Ammuuu
